allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import app.main; from app.parsing import extract_text; from app.profile import build_profile, enforce_factual_fields; from app.llm_providers import generate_json; print\('all imports OK'\)")

Bash(sed -i 's|doc.add_paragraph\("Jane Dev jane@x.com Python"\)|doc.add_paragraph\("Jane Dev - jane@x.com - 555-0100 - New York. Software Engineer with Python, SQL, and REST API experience."\)|' test_v3.py)
Bash(sed -i 's|score = 88 if "Kubernetes" in user else 54|score = 88 if "1M req/day" in user else 54|' /tmp/test_v3.py)

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('static/index.html','utf8'\);const m=s.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*\)<\\/script>/\);const js=m[1];try{new Function\(js\);console.log\('JS parses OK \(no syntax errors\)'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('JS SYNTAX ERROR:',e.message\);}")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8011 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }')

Bash(sed -i 's|assert any\("Today.s date is June 12, 2026" in s for s in SYS\), "date not injected into generate prompt"|import datetime; td=datetime.date.today\(\).strftime\("%B %d, %Y"\); assert any\(\("Today'"'"'s date is "+td\) in s for s in SYS\), "date not injected"|' /tmp/test_v5.py)
